title: IRS Section 170 and Digital Asset Donations: Why Every Crypto Gift Over $5,000 Requires a Qualified Appraisal
excerpt: The IRS requires a qualified appraisal for all cryptocurrency and NFT charitable donations exceeding $5,000. Learn what Section 170 demands, how to file Form 8283, and why exchange prices will not protect your deduction.
author: Qualified Digital Asset Valuations (QDAV)
meta_description: The IRS requires a qualified appraisal for all cryptocurrency and NFT charitable donations exceeding $5,000. Learn what Section 170 demands, how to file Form 8283, and why exchange prices will not protect your deduction.

title: IRS Requirements for Crypto Appraisals in Self-Directed IRAs: 2026 Guide
excerpt: Understand the IRS appraisal requirements for cryptocurrency held in self-directed IRAs. Learn why a USPAP-compliant qualified appraisal protects your retirement portfolio from audit risk in 2026.
author: Qualified Digital Asset Valuations (QDAV)
meta_description: Understand the IRS appraisal requirements for cryptocurrency held in self-directed IRAs. Learn why a USPAP-compliant qualified appraisal protects your retirement portfolio from audit risk in 2026.

title: Navigating SDIRA Crypto Compliance: A Sage's Guide to Secure Retirement Investing
excerpt: Learn how to safely invest in cryptocurrency within your Self-Directed IRA (SDIRA). Our expert guide covers custodians, prohibited transactions, and tax compliance.
author: Sage Financial Team
description: Learn how to safely invest in cryptocurrency within your Self-Directed IRA (SDIRA). Our expert guide covers custodians, prohibited transactions, and tax compliance.
